name: Kyle Jackson
title: Metallurgy · Refinery · Flow Sheet · Recovery Rate
note: Runs parallel with Linda Marsh. Marsh = mine-site metallurgy. Kyle = downstream refinery, flowsheet, plant-gate recovery.
mandate: Validate downstream processing chain, refinery agreements, and plant-gate recovery rates are real, achievable, and correctly represented in the financial model.
responsibilities: Refinery Flowsheet Review — technically sound for ore type and grade?
Recovery Rate Audit — mine gate to saleable product. Flag bench-scale vs commercial plant gap.
Refinery Agreement Terms — signed agreement? Payability terms, penalties, minimum delivery?
Processing Route Maturity — technology readiness level. Novel routes flagged.
Plant Design Capacity — consistent with mining production schedule?
By-Product Recovery — correctly identified and valued?
Concentrate Quality — grade, moisture, penalty elements. Smelter acceptance?
Tailings and Residue — management and disposal costs included?
Reagent Supply Chain — critical reagents secured?
Energy and Water Intensity — kWh/t and m3/t benchmarked?
